tools.name: post_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel via the Slack Web API (https://slack.com/api). Authenticates with the SLACK_BOT_TOKEN environment variable.

channel_id.description: ID of the channel to post in

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List public channels in the workspace via the Slack Web API at https://slack.com/api.

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous call

tools.name: get_users
tools.description: Fetch the members of the Slack workspace from the Slack Web API at https://slack.com/api.

limit.description: Maximum number of users to return

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous call
